example.target: Agora entendo melhor a gramática.
example.gloss: Now I understand the grammar better.

example.target: A professora explicou a regra duas vezes.
example.gloss: The teacher explained the rule twice.

example.target: O que significa esta palavra?
example.gloss: What does this word mean?

example.target: Aqui não permitem animais.
example.gloss: They don't allow animals here.

example.target: É proibido estacionar nesta rua.
example.gloss: Parking is forbidden on this street.

words.en: to offer; to give (as a gift)
words.note: in pt-PT often means to give a present

example.target: A minha avó ofereceu-me uma camisola.
example.gloss: My grandmother gave me a jumper as a present.

example.target: Podes emprestar-me a tua caneta?
example.gloss: Can you lend me your pen?

example.target: Guarda o telemóvel na mochila.
example.gloss: Put the mobile phone away in the backpack.

example.target: Encontramo-nos à frente do cinema às sete.
example.gloss: We're meeting in front of the cinema at seven.

example.target: Cumprimentei o vizinho no elevador.
example.gloss: I greeted the neighbour in the lift.

example.target: Despedimo-nos na estação de comboios.
example.gloss: We said goodbye at the train station.

example.target: Eles casaram-se no verão passado.
example.gloss: They got married last summer.

example.target: A minha filha nasceu em Coimbra.
example.gloss: My daughter was born in Coimbra.

example.target: Cresci numa aldeia pequena.
example.gloss: I grew up in a small village.

example.target: O escritor morreu há dez anos.
example.gloss: The writer died ten years ago.

example.target: Quero mudar de emprego este ano.
example.gloss: I want to change jobs this year.

example.target: Mudámo-nos para Lisboa em janeiro.
example.gloss: We moved to Lisbon in January.

example.target: Com o tempo, tornámo-nos bons amigos.
example.gloss: Over time, we became good friends.

example.target: Pareces cansado hoje.
example.gloss: You look tired today.

example.target: O que aconteceu ontem à noite?
example.gloss: What happened last night?

example.target: O tempo passa depressa nas férias.
example.gloss: Time passes quickly on holiday.

example.target: O filme passa-se em Lisboa.
example.gloss: The film takes place in Lisbon.

example.target: Caí na rua porque o chão estava molhado.
example.gloss: I fell in the street because the ground was wet.

example.target: As crianças saltaram para a piscina.
example.gloss: The children jumped into the pool.

example.target: Tens de empurrar a porta, não puxar.
example.gloss: You have to push the door, not pull it.

example.target: Puxa a cadeira e senta-te.
example.gloss: Pull up the chair and sit down.

example.target: O miúdo atirou a bola para o jardim.
example.gloss: The kid threw the ball into the garden.

words.en: to grab, catch, hold on to

example.target: Agarra bem o corrimão nas escadas.
example.gloss: Hold on tight to the handrail on the stairs.

example.target: Podes segurar o saco um momento?
example.gloss: Can you hold the bag for a moment?

words.en: to touch; to play (an instrument); to ring

example.target: Ela toca piano desde os seis anos.
example.gloss: She has played the piano since she was six.

example.target: Não mexas nos meus papéis, por favor.
example.gloss: Don't touch my papers, please.

example.target: A chuva estragou o nosso passeio.
example.gloss: The rain ruined our outing.

words.note: very common pt-PT verb: fix, obtain, sort out

example.target: O técnico arranjou a máquina de lavar.
example.gloss: The technician fixed the washing machine.

example.target: Vão reparar o telhado na próxima semana.
example.gloss: They're going to repair the roof next week.

example.target: Estão a construir um prédio novo na minha rua.
example.gloss: They're building a new building on my street.

example.target: Corta o queijo em fatias finas.
example.gloss: Cut the cheese into thin slices.

example.target: Vamos pintar a parede de azul.
example.gloss: We're going to paint the wall blue.

example.target: O meu filho adora desenhar animais.
example.gloss: My son loves drawing animals.

example.target: Medimos o quarto antes de comprar a cama.
example.gloss: We measured the room before buying the bed.

example.target: A mala pesa vinte quilos.
example.gloss: The suitcase weighs twenty kilos.

example.target: O avô contou uma história aos netos.
example.gloss: The grandfather told the grandchildren a story.

example.target: Calcula quanto vamos gastar na viagem.
example.gloss: Calculate how much we're going to spend on the trip.

words.note: vale a pena = it's worth it

example.target: Vale a pena visitar Sintra.
example.gloss: It's worth visiting Sintra.

example.target: Estamos a poupar para comprar casa.
example.gloss: We're saving up to buy a house.

example.target: Assine aqui, por favor.
example.gloss: Sign here, please.

example.target: Preencha este formulário com os seus dados.
example.gloss: Fill in this form with your details.

words.note: marcar uma consulta = to book an appointment

example.target: Marquei uma consulta no dentista para sexta-feira.
example.gloss: I booked a dentist appointment for Friday.

example.target: Tivemos de cancelar a reserva do hotel.
example.gloss: We had to cancel the hotel reservation.

example.target: A reunião foi adiada para quinta-feira.
example.gloss: The meeting was postponed to Thursday.

words.en: to be missing, be lacking; to miss (class)

example.target: Faltam cinco minutos para o comboio partir.
example.gloss: There are five minutes left before the train leaves.

example.target: Sobrou muita comida do jantar.
example.gloss: A lot of food was left over from dinner.

example.target: Este casaco não me serve, é pequeno.
example.gloss: This coat doesn't fit me, it's small.

example.target: O elevador não está a funcionar.
example.gloss: The lift isn't working.

words.en: to turn on; to call (on the phone)

example.target: Liga a televisão, o jogo vai começar.
example.gloss: Turn on the TV, the match is about to start.

words.en: to turn off; to hang up

example.target: Desliga o telemóvel antes do filme.
example.gloss: Turn off your mobile phone before the film.

words.en: to charge; to load; to press

example.target: Preciso de carregar o telemóvel.
example.gloss: I need to charge my mobile phone.

example.target: Gravei o programa para ver mais tarde.
example.gloss: I recorded the programme to watch later.

example.target: Podes imprimir estes documentos?
example.gloss: Can you print these documents?

words.en: to turn off (a light); to erase, delete

example.target: Apaga a luz quando saíres.
example.gloss: Turn off the light when you leave.

words.en: to light; to turn on (a light)

example.target: Acendi as velas do bolo.
example.gloss: I lit the candles on the cake.

example.target: Vou aquecer a sopa no micro-ondas.
example.gloss: I'm going to heat the soup in the microwave.

example.target: Deixa o chá arrefecer um pouco.
example.gloss: Let the tea cool down a bit.

example.target: A água já está a ferver.
example.gloss: The water is already boiling.

example.target: Cozi as batatas durante vinte minutos.
example.gloss: I boiled the potatoes for twenty minutes.

example.target: Assámos o frango no forno.
example.gloss: We roasted the chicken in the oven.

example.target: Fritei os ovos em azeite.
example.gloss: I fried the eggs in olive oil.

example.target: Tempera a salada com sal e azeite.
example.gloss: Season the salad with salt and olive oil.

example.target: Esta flor cheira muito bem.
example.gloss: This flower smells very nice.

example.target: Senti frio durante a noite.
example.gloss: I felt cold during the night.

example.target: Não grites, o bebé está a dormir.
example.gloss: Don't shout, the baby is sleeping.

example.target: Ela sussurrou a resposta ao colega.
example.gloss: She whispered the answer to her classmate.

example.target: A menina sorriu para a fotografia.
example.gloss: The girl smiled for the photo.

example.target: Não te preocupes, tudo vai correr bem.
example.gloss: Don't worry, everything will go well.

example.target: Depois de conversar com a mãe, ela acalmou-se.
example.gloss: After talking with her mother, she calmed down.

example.target: O pai zangou-se porque chegámos tarde.
example.gloss: Dad got angry because we arrived late.

example.target: Os vizinhos queixaram-se do barulho.
example.gloss: The neighbours complained about the noise.

example.target: Discutimos o problema durante a reunião.
example.gloss: We discussed the problem during the meeting.

example.target: Concordo contigo, é uma boa ideia.
example.gloss: I agree with you, it's a good idea.

example.target: Ele discordou do plano na reunião.
example.gloss: He disagreed with the plan at the meeting.

example.target: Não me mintas, eu vi tudo.
example.gloss: Don't lie to me, I saw everything.

example.target: Prometo chegar a horas amanhã.
example.gloss: I promise to arrive on time tomorrow.

example.target: Avisa-me quando chegares a casa.
example.gloss: Let me know when you get home.

example.target: O médico aconselhou-me a descansar.
example.gloss: The doctor advised me to rest.
